title: What date does Viking Therapeutics's (VKTX) report Earnings - Earnings Calendar & Announcement
text: Earnings calendar and announcement dates for Viking Therapeutics (VKTX) from Zacks. Provides historical earnings report dates, earnings-per-share estimates and actuals, earnings surprises, and upcoming earnings announcement dates. Shows the company's pattern of beating or missing consensus estimates. Useful for tracking when earnings releases are scheduled and what the consensus expectations are for each quarter.
